data.title: First Eagle Finalizes Acquisition and Delisting of Diamond Hill
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Diamond Hill Investment Group ( (DHIL) ) has issued an announcement.

First Eagle Investments, an independent and fundamentally driven investment management firm, completed its acquisition of Diamond Hill Investment Group on April 22, 2026, after the deal was announced in December 2025 and approved by Diamond Hill shareholders on March 3, 2026. The transaction significantly expands First Eagle’s presence in traditional fixed income and adds Diamond Hill’s U.S.-focused multi-cap equity platform, bringing the combined firm’s pro forma assets under management and advisement to about $213 billion as of March 31, 2026.

In connection with the merger’s closing, Diamond Hill discharged its existing credit agreement and requested suspension of trading and delisting of its common shares from Nasdaq prior to the market open on April 22, 2026, with plans to deregister the shares and end periodic SEC reporting. Governance and corporate documents were overhauled as Merger Sub’s directors and officers replaced the prior board and management, and the company’s articles of incorporation and code of regulations were amended and restated under the merger terms.

Diamond Hill will continue operating from Columbus with no changes to its investment philosophy or process, while becoming a core pillar of First Eagle’s broadened product lineup. Chief Executive Heather Brilliant will keep leading Diamond Hill and concurrently take on the newly created role of Chief Operating Officer at First Eagle, overseeing public markets operations, technology, integration and human capital as the combined firm pursues both organic and inorganic growth initiatives.

Spark’s Take on DHIL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DHIL is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong profitability and a conservative balance sheet, plus attractive valuation (low P/E and solid dividend yield). Offsetting these positives are material concerns around cash-flow volatility and negative 2025 cash flow, while technicals are supportive but not strongly bullish; merger progress is a modest additional positive with some legal/execution risk.

To see Spark’s full report on DHIL stock, click here.

More about Diamond Hill Investment Group

Diamond Hill Investment Group, now a First Eagle Investments company, is a boutique investment manager that applies a long-term, valuation-driven approach across U.S. and international equity, alternative long-short equity and fixed income strategies. Based in Columbus, Ohio, it managed and advised approximately $27 billion in assets as of March 31, 2026, with a focus on capacity discipline and client alignment.

Average Trading Volume: 24,329

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $473.2M

For a thorough assessment of DHIL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: AECI Misses Sustainability Targets, Triggers Margin Step-Up on Linked Notes
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

AECI Ltd ( (GB:87FZ) ) has shared an announcement.

AECI has published its Sustainability Compliance Certificate and accompanying assurance report for investors in its sustainability-linked notes due 2026 and 2028. The documentation confirms that for the 2025 financial year the company did not meet its three sustainability performance targets tied to carbon footprint efficiency, effluent discharge efficiency and female representation.

Because none of the targets were achieved, the interest margin on both note series will increase by 10 basis points from 11 June 2026, raising the spreads over 3‑month ZAR‑JIBAR to 149 basis points for AECI05 and 160 basis points for AECI06. AECI attributed the environmental underperformance to lower‑than‑assumed production volumes and operational variability, and said its slight shortfall on female representation stemmed from restructuring and divestments, while reiterating its commitment to gender diversity initiatives.

More about AECI Ltd

AECI Limited is a South African chemicals and explosives group that issues debt under a ZAR5 billion Domestic Medium Term Note Programme. The company serves industrial and mining customers with specialised products and services, and has embedded sustainability-linked performance targets into certain bond issues to align its financing with environmental and social objectives.

AECI focuses on improving carbon and effluent efficiency, as well as advancing gender diversity in management, reflecting broader industry moves toward measurable ESG outcomes in capital markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £482.8M

For a thorough assessment of 87FZ stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Sampo AGM Backs Dividend, Major Buyback Mandate and Governance Changes
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sampo Plc ( (GB:0HAG) ) has provided an announcement.

Sampo plc’s Annual General Meeting approved all board proposals, including a dividend of EUR 0.36 per share for 2025, adoption of the 2025 accounts, discharge of the board and CEOs from liability, and an authorisation to repurchase up to 250 million A shares for cancellation. The board composition was largely maintained with one new member, committee structures were confirmed, director and committee fees were raised and partly tied to share purchases, and Deloitte was reappointed as auditor and sustainability assurance provider, underscoring Sampo’s focus on capital returns, governance stability and strengthened oversight for shareholders.

The AGM confirmed a dividend of EUR 0.36 per share for 2025 and authorised repurchases of up to 250 million A shares, signalling a continued commitment to returning capital to investors. The election of a largely unchanged, fully independent board, the appointment of a new director and the enhanced fee and committee structure, alongside Deloitte’s reappointment as auditor and sustainability assurer, reinforce Sampo’s governance framework and oversight practices.

More about Sampo Plc

Sampo plc is a Nordic financial services group focused on insurance operations across Finland, Sweden, Denmark and other European markets. The company provides a broad range of non-life insurance products and related financial services, positioning itself as a key player in the region’s insurance and risk management sector.

Find detailed analytics on 0HAG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Hargreave Hale AIM VCT 1 ( (GB:HHV) ) has shared an announcement.

Hargreave Hale AIM VCT plc has repurchased 228,376 ordinary shares at 30.63 pence each for cancellation, reducing its share count and slightly enhancing the ownership percentage of remaining shareholders. Following this transaction, the company has 376,267,655 ordinary shares in issue, each carrying one vote and forming the new baseline for calculating voting rights under UK disclosure rules.

The company holds no shares in treasury, meaning all remaining shares are freely floating and count toward total voting rights. Investors and regulatory observers will use the updated share capital figure to assess whether holdings cross disclosure thresholds, ensuring continued compliance with the Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financials: a conservative, debt-free balance sheet is a clear positive, but it is weighed down by volatile earnings, a steep 2025 revenue decline, and consistently negative operating cash flow. Technical signals are weak (oversold/negative momentum), while the high dividend yield and positive corporate updates provide partial support.

Hargreave Hale AIM VCT plc is a UK-listed venture capital trust focused on investing in smaller, high-growth companies quoted on the London Stock Exchange’s AIM market. The vehicle provides investors with exposure to early-stage and emerging businesses while offering the UK tax advantages associated with VCT structures.

data.title: Aclarion Launches $2.5 Million Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aclarion, Inc. ( (ACON) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Aclarion, Inc.’s board of directors authorized a share repurchase program of up to $2.5 million of its outstanding common stock, with the company planning to execute buybacks over the next 12 months using existing cash and cash equivalents. As of March 31, 2026, Aclarion held about $19 million in cash and cash equivalents, and management said the program reflects confidence in the firm’s valuation and its ability to fund operations through key milestones, while balancing Nociscan growth investment with disciplined capital management.

The repurchases may be conducted through various methods, including open market purchases, privately negotiated transactions, block trades, accelerated share repurchases and 10b5-1 trading plans, and the company is not obligated to buy a specific number of shares and can modify or suspend the program at any time. Executives framed the move as a flexible tool to enhance shareholder value without compromising financial flexibility, signaling Aclarion’s intent to support continued adoption and expansion of its Nociscan platform while actively managing its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (ACON) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aclarion, Inc. stock, see the ACON Stock Forecast page.

More about Aclarion, Inc.

Aclarion, Inc. is a commercial-stage healthcare technology company that leverages magnetic resonance spectroscopy, proprietary signal processing, biomarkers and augmented intelligence algorithms to optimize clinical treatments. The company is initially focused on the chronic low back pain market through its Nociscan SaaS platform, which helps physicians distinguish between painful and nonpainful lumbar discs to improve treatment decisions.

Nociscan operates via a cloud-based connection that receives MRS data from MRI machines for each lumbar disc being evaluated and extracts chemical biomarkers associated with disc pain. These biomarkers are processed through proprietary algorithms to indicate whether a disc may be a source of pain, providing physicians with critical insights into pain location when used alongside other diagnostic tools.

Average Trading Volume: 95,039

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.1M

Find detailed analytics on ACON stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Executives Report Minor Share Purchases Under UK Plans
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) is now available.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners has disclosed a series of small share acquisitions by several senior executives under its UK employee share plans. Chief Financial Officer Edward Walker, General Counsel and Company Secretary Svetlana Walker, Chief Commercial Officer Stephen Lusk, and regional general managers Leendert den Hollander and Stephen Moorhouse each acquired around 3.73 ordinary shares on 20 April via the UK Share Plan, with Lusk also buying about 2.04 shares through the UK Shareshop, all on Nasdaq.

The transactions, while individually low in value, signal continued executive participation in the company’s equity-based incentive arrangements and align management interests with those of shareholders. The notifications fulfil regulatory requirements for reporting dealings by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and indicate ongoing use of share plans as part of Coca-Cola Europacific Partners’ remuneration and retention strategy.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners plc is a major beverage bottler and distributor, producing and supplying Coca-Cola branded soft drinks and related non-alcoholic beverages. The company focuses on key markets across Europe and the Pacific region, operating as a core partner within the wider Coca-Cola system and listing its ordinary shares on major exchanges including Nasdaq.

data.title: Ximei Resources Reschedules 2026 AGM and Adjusts Dividend Record Dates
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ximei Resources Holding Ltd. ( (HK:9936) ) has shared an update.

Ximei Resources Holding Limited has rescheduled its 2026 annual general meeting from 27 May to 29 June 2026 in Hong Kong due to administrative reasons, and adjusted the related book closure period for determining shareholders’ eligibility to attend and vote. The register of members will now be closed from 24 to 29 June 2026 for AGM voting rights, and from 6 to 8 July 2026 to establish entitlement to the proposed final dividend, with the shares trading ex-dividend from 2 July and payment expected on 17 July 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

These changes primarily affect procedural timelines rather than core operations, but are important for investors planning share transfers or seeking to exercise voting rights and receive the final dividend. By clarifying the new dates and record periods, the company aims to provide certainty to stakeholders and maintain orderly trading and corporate governance processes aligned with Hong Kong market practices.

More about Ximei Resources Holding Ltd.

Ximei Resources Holding Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the resources sector and is primarily engaged in the production and sale of metal-related products. The company serves shareholders globally through its Hong Kong share registrar, reflecting a capital-market focus typical of mid-sized listed resource companies.

Average Trading Volume: 746,984

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$6B

JTF International Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:9689) ) has shared an update.

JTF International Holdings Ltd. has called its annual general meeting for 22 June 2026 in Guangzhou, where shareholders will review and adopt the audited financial statements and directors’ and auditor’s reports for the year ended 31 December 2025. data.title: Mowi Secures Approval to List Green Bonds on Oslo Stock Exchange
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mowi ASA ( (GB:0OAW) ) has issued an announcement.

Mowi ASA has received approval from Norway’s Financial Supervisory Authority for a base prospectus covering its senior unsecured green bonds issued in late 2025, enabling their listing on the Oslo Stock Exchange under two separate ISINs. The approval and planned listing enhance the company’s access to green capital markets, supporting its sustainability-linked financing strategy and potentially broadening its investor base.

The listing of Mowi’s green bonds on a major regulated market is likely to improve liquidity and transparency for bondholders while underscoring the company’s commitment to environmentally aligned funding. This step may strengthen Mowi’s position among ESG-focused investors and could lower long-term financing costs as demand for certified green instruments continues to rise.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0OAW) stock is a Hold with a NOK220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mowi ASA stock, see the GB:0OAW Stock Forecast page.

More about Mowi ASA

Mowi ASA is a Norwegian seafood company and one of the world’s largest producers of farmed salmon, supplying global markets with farmed seafood products. The company focuses on sustainable aquaculture and increasingly uses green financing instruments to support environmentally focused operations and investments.
